meaning: adj.梯状的,分等级的,数量的,标量的n.数量,标量
examples: The volume V is given in terms of the scalar triple product.
Quantum announced a Scalar i6000 HD rack-based tape library archiving system that can scale to over 75 PB.
At at a physics conference in March to discuss the discovery of the Higgs, researchers were encouraged to refer to the particle as the "SM Scalar Boson".
